[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 11000100 3
2 00000110 2
3 01011000 3
4 10111110 6
5 10111111 7
6 01110011 5
7 11001101 5

01 10 11000110 4
12 21 01011110 5
23 32 11111110 7
34 43 10111111 7 match 5
45 54 11111111 a
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 11111101 7
70 07 11110100 5

02 20 11011100 5
13 31 10111110 6 match 4
24 42 11111111 a
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 11111111 a
57 75 11110111 7
60 06 11001101 5 match 7
71 17 11110110 6

03 30 11111110 7
14 41 10111111 7 match 5
25 52 01111011 6
36 63 11111111 a
47 74 11111111 a
50 05 11110111 7
61 16 11001111 6
72 27 11111100 6

04 40 11111111 a
15 51 01110111 6
26 62 11011101 6
37 73 11111110 7
